---
title: "example"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(httr)
```

```{r}
base_url <- "https://api.census.gov/data/2023/cps/volunteer/sep"
```

```{r}
vars <- "PEAGE,PESEX,PTDTRACE,PEVOLUNT"
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(httr)



```{r}

```
